detectives.description: Hunts malformed AST nodes, corrupted tensor shapes, and hallucinated type annotations across the inference graph.
Detects ghost model weights — when an agent inherits parameters from a dead or cloned inference session without a valid Ed25519 lineage.
Monitors 24GB physical memory ceiling in real-time. If inference pressure approaches the wall, she triggers emergency agent handoff to M1THER buffer or purges ghost sessions.

colony_note: ALICE detectives pair cross-chain with M1THER detectives by index. DEEP_SYNTAX_AUDITOR<->VECTOR, TENSOR_PHANTOM<->CIPHER, SILICON_HOUND<->HOUND. Dialect: IDENTITY_COLONY_V1.
